ground_truth.title: Xfinity TV and Streaming - Xfinity Entertainment
ground_truth.main_content: It's easy with Xfinity. Imagine all the entertainment you want, all in one place. It's easy with Xfinity. Live TV: Discover. Watch. Repeat. Explore channels, TV packages, and add-ons with Xfinity TV. StreamStore: All your favorite streaming services at your fingertips with simplified billing. Sports: Always know where to watch your favorite teams and leagues. An unmatched viewing experience: Award-winning Xfinity equipment lets you pair Xfinity entertainment with internet and mobile for unbeatable value. Full coverage with Xfinity Sports Zone. Watch four games at once with Multiview. All from the best seat in the house - yours. The most powerful search engine? Your voice: Find that show everyone's talking about across live TV, apps, On Demand, and your DVR library with the Xfinity Voice Remote. Turn any screen into a TV: Watch your favorite movies and shows on any compatible device from anywhere with the Xfinity Stream app. All the top apps in one place: Xumo Stream Box from Xfinity gives you all the top apps in one place. Just plug it in to your Xfinity TV to start watching. Add-on channels: Add sports packages, premium channels like Max and Paramount Plus, and more to your plan.
with: Imagine all the entertainment you want, all in one place. It's easy with Xfinity.
